product_summary: Receipt OCR App is a Next.js 16 web application for uploading receipt images, extracting structured data via Google Cloud Vision OCR, and managing expenses in a Notion-like table interface. It features AI-powered field extraction and expense categorization via OpenRouter, an AI chat sidebar for querying expenses with natural language (tool_use support), SKR03 German accounting standard category mapping, and deploys to Cloudflare Pages via OpenNext. The app uses @marlinjai/storage-brain-sdk for file uploads and @marlinjai/data-table-react with a D1 adapter for the interactive data table. It is part of the MarlinJai ERP Suite.
